bonuses.stat: Consuming a corpse causes the corpse to explode, dealing 1298 Magic Damage to enemies within 5 meters and applying Minor Breach to them for 5 seconds, reducing their Physical and Spell Resistance by 2974. This effect can occur once every 0.5 seconds, scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage, and deals 10% more damage for each Grave Lord ability slotted.
